metadata.challenge_summary: Agents must coordinate movement through cover and decide whether to rush the mage or clear the guard first.
dilemmas: Rushing the mage exposes the wizard
Clearing the guard gives the mage more shots
Destroying a brazier weakens the mage but raises alert
warden_runbook: Use the mage to punish exposed lines
Keep the guard between heroes and mage
metadata.lite_focus: Two-threat tower: one ranged mage, one guard, and furniture that teaches cover/counterplay without a long map.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: advance under caster pressure without abandoning fragile support
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the declared MARL axis: target priority with asymmetric threat ranges
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: coordinate extraction once the objective is secured
coordination_skills: use cover, doors, and interrupts before advancing
review_metrics: turns caster remains alive after reveal
metadata.tier_test_focus: Small two-hero diagnostic for communication and first-order target priority under ranged threat coordination.
coordination_demands: use cover, doors, and interrupts before advancing

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Cinder Mage Tower is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: target priority with asymmetric threat ranges.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Cracked Brazier
furniture.description: Primary clue object for target priority with asymmetric threat ranges. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Support Marker
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains target priority with asymmetric threat ranges.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: Two-threat tower: one ranged mage, one guard, and furniture that teaches cover/counterplay without a long map.

marl_contract.axis: target priority with asymmetric threat ranges
core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Use the mage to punish exposed lines
Keep the guard between heroes and mage
pressure the declared MARL axis: target priority with asymmetric threat ranges
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

cinder_mage_1.name: Cinder Tutor
cinder_mage_1.public_summary: Lite boss for target priority with asymmetric threat ranges; it should test coordination before raw damage.
cinder_mage_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
cinder_mage_1.defeat_description: Defeat Cinder Tutor after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
